headline: SanDisk Plunges 11%, Micron and Western Digital Slide 10% as Korean Market Crash Hits Memory Chips
summary: Shares of SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) are leading a sharp memory-chip selloff Tuesday morning session, with SanDisk stock down 11% to $2,027.50. The decline comes one day after the stock closed at a record high, capping a stunning run higher. Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) stock is sliding alongside it, off 10% to $1,085, while Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) shares ...
